queries.question: Show civil engineering jobs and architecture jobs that use AutoCAD software.
queries.sql:
SELECT Construction_Jobs.jobTitle 
FROM Construction_Jobs JOIN Design_Software_Expertise ON Construction_Jobs.designSoftware = Design_Software_Expertise.softwareName
WHERE (Construction_Jobs.ConstructionJobType = "Civil Engineering" OR Construction_Jobs.ConstructionJobType = "Architecture") AND Design_Software_Expertise.softwareName = "AutoCAD"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?jobtitle WHERE {
  ?construction_jobs a :Construction_Jobs .
  ?design_software_expertise a :Design_Software_Expertise .
  ?construction_jobs p:designSoftware ?designsoftware_l .
  ?design_software_expertise p:softwareName ?softwarename_r .
  ?construction_jobs p:jobTitle ?jobtitle .
  ?construction_jobs p:constructionJobType ?constructionjobtype_w .
  ?construction_jobs p:constructionJobType ?constructionjobtype_w2 .
  ?design_software_expertise p:softwareName ?softwarename_w .
  FILTER(STR(?designsoftware_l) = STR(?softwarename_r))
  FILTER((((STR(?constructionjobtype_w) = "Civil Engineering" || STR(?constructionjobtype_w2) = "Architecture")) && STR(?softwarename_w) = "AutoCAD"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show civil engineering jobs and architecture jobs that use AutoCAD software.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?jobtitle WHERE {
  ?construction_jobs a :Construction_Jobs .
  ?design_software_expertise a :Design_Software_Expertise .
  ?construction_jobs p:designSoftware ?designsoftware_l .
  ?design_software_expertise p:softwareName ?softwarename_r .
  ?construction_jobs p:jobTitle ?jobtitle .
  ?construction_jobs p:constructionJobType ?constructionjobtype_w .
  ?construction_jobs p:constructionJobType ?constructionjobtype_w2 .
  ?design_software_expertise p:softwareName ?softwarename_w .
  FILTER(STR(?designsoftware_l) = STR(?softwarename_r))
  FILTER((((STR(?constructionjobtype_w) = "Civil Engineering" || STR(?constructionjobtype_w2) = "Architecture")) && STR(?softwarename_w) = "AutoCAD"))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?jobtitle WHERE {
  ?construction_jobs a :Construction_Jobs .
  ?design_software_expertise a :Design_Software_Expertise .
  ?construction_jobs p:designSoftware ?designsoftware_l .
  ?design_software_expertise p:softwareName ?softwarename_r .
  ?construction_jobs p:jobTitle ?jobtitle .
  ?construction_jobs p:constructionJobType ?constructionjobtype_w .
  ?construction_jobs p:constructionJobType ?constructionjobtype_w2 .
  ?design_software_expertise p:softwareName ?softwarename_w .
  FILTER(STR(?designsoftware_l) = STR(?softwarename_r))
  FILTER((STR(?constructionjobtype_w) = "Civil Engineering" || (STR(?constructionjobtype_w2) = "Architecture" && STR(?softwarename_w) = "AutoCAD")))
} }
}
